challenge: Build with DataHub: The Agent Hackathon

checks.name: DataHub payload preview
checks.detail: 4 dry-run aspect payloads prepared for local GMS posting.

checks.name: DataHub readiness doctor
checks.detail: 6 checks confirm dry-run DataHub readiness and keep local GMS optional.

checks.name: DataHub integration checklist
checks.detail: 5 verification phases separate runnable evidence from optional local DataHub posting.

checks.name: DataHub claim audit
checks.detail: 5 DataHub-specific claims passed aspect, context-read, local-posting, safety, and receipt checks.

checks.name: DataHub MCP handoff
checks.detail: 4 tool calls connect DataHub reads, CAT policy context, and bounded receipt writes.

checks.name: MCP adapter smoke test
checks.detail: 3 local adapter flows proved read-before-write ordering and bounded receipt writes.

checks.name: submission honesty audit
checks.detail: 5 honesty checks passed for public copy, optional DataHub posting, safety boundaries, and no-overclaim language.

checks.name: decision trace
checks.detail: 3 request-level traces connect source rows, context reads, decisions, and receipts.

checks.name: lineage decision map
checks.detail: 9 nodes and 11 edges show source → DataHub context → decisions → receipts.

checks.name: safety policy matrix
checks.detail: 6 rules and 3 request outcomes define allowed, approval-required, and blocked action boundaries.

checks.name: live DataHub runbook
checks.detail: 5 operator commands document the opt-in local DataHub post and verification path.

checks.name: judge walkthrough
checks.detail: 5 judge walkthrough steps document the shortest terminal proof path.

checks.name: judge FAQ
checks.detail: 5 hard judge questions answered with evidence files and verification commands.

checks.name: judge quick card
checks.detail: 2-minute scoring card links the live demo, video, one-command proof, DataHub evidence, and safety boundary.

checks.name: safety boundary
checks.detail: Blocked action remains preserved for unverified external outreach.

checks.name: judge evidence
checks.detail: Judge notes, evidence pack, context contracts, readiness report, and validation report are regenerated.
